text:
is a support module for Evangelion units. It appears in the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novels.

It is meant to combine with an Evangelion unit through the three-point plug used for the Umbilical Cable. It enables the full energetic autonomy of the Eva unit via the internal Reactor of the Allegorica unit as well as both atmospheric and sub-orbital space flight capabilities.

Two Evangelions have been seen equipped with an Allegorica unit: Evangelion Unit-02 Type II and Evangelion Unit-00 Type-F.

Piloted by Asuka Langley Sohryu, it is the combination of the Evangelion Unit-02 Type II Allegorica and the UX-1 Allegorica support unit. This makes it look like a Centaur, a creature that appeared in classical Greek Mythology, only with the addition of wings. Evangelion Unit-02 Type II Allegorica first sortied to reach the Moon to confront Armaros.

Originally intended to be piloted by Rei Ayanami, it was later refitted to be piloted by Rei Six. It is the combination of the Evangelion Unit-00 Type F and the UX-1 Allegorica support unit. It uses the Magoruku Exterminate Sword Stage 2, while the "Angel Spine" cannon is attached to the Allegorica unit itself.

Trivia

"FLY ME TO THE MOON" is written on both side of the Allegorica unit, as a reference to the ending theme of the anime, which is further derived from the original source, Bart Howard's "Fly me To The Moon".
The UX-1 Allegorica's design is somewhat similar to that of a vulture or a bird of prey.
